prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `2685904e`.
codex_response:
`2685904e` is implemented. The rule is: count the top-row `8`s to get `N`, find every color in the lower source row whose frequency is exactly `N`, and copy those colored columns upward for `N` rows immediately above the gray separator. I used the `opus46` hint and rejected the `sonnet45` hint because its “minority colors” reading contradicts the official examples; that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2685904e/notes.md#L1).

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2685904e/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2685904e/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2685904e/generator.py#L11). No new primitive was needed. The generator keeps the fixed 10x10 layout, full colored source row, gray `5` separator, and exact-frequency bar projection pattern from the official family.

Validation passed end-to-end: official verifier `7/7`, generated verifier `1000/1000`. Artifacts were created at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2685904e/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2685904e/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2685904e/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2685904e/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2685904e/previews/preview_03.png). I also spot-checked rebuilt samples and the first preview sheet in-terminal after fixing an initial generator padding bug.
